entry.condition: Enter when either a fixed 32/68 TDI sharkfin trigger fires or a TDI Bollinger-band sharkfin trigger fires.
entry.default_threshold: Long: fixed 32 sharkfin OR lower TDI Bollinger-band sharkfin. Sell/reduce: fixed 68 sharkfin OR upper TDI Bollinger-band sharkfin.

confirmation.condition: Fast TDI must curl back from an extreme. The extreme can be the fixed 32/68 band or the outer TDI Bollinger volatility band.
confirmation.default_threshold: Sharkfin reversal confirmation from fixed band or TDI Bollinger band

take_profit.condition: Primary long exit is when the TDI signal line reaches 68. A short/backtest short exits when the TDI signal line reaches 32.
take_profit.default_threshold: TDI signal line 68 exit for long positions

stop_loss.condition: Backup safety exit if price moves against the entry before the TDI exit appears.

risk_governor.spot_wallet_rule: Long buys USDT to selected token. Sell/exit reduces selected token to USDT only if the wallet already holds the token.
